calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Confirm Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-01-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bresler for and with Joan Jeong.

The Court stated that it received the declaration from Ms. Jeong, that it does not help the Court much, that it does not say when the notations were made, that the change from 1/3 to 2/3 does not have initials and that there is no indication as when that happened. Mr. Bresler presented oral argument to support his position. The Petition for Order to Confirm Trust Assets was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Clark. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order To Confirm Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-22-2013 Continued To Oct-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Bresler for Joan Jeong.

Mr. Bresler stated that he does not know who or when the typed 1/3 interest in the Chattanooga property on the schedule of trust assets was crossed out and written in as a 2/3 interest. Mr. Bresler also stated that he could go back to Ms. Jeong to see if that is her writing, that he does not know what the property is worth, that Ms. Jeong is now receiving financial guidance, that the other 1/3 interest is owned by the Brother, that the Brother wants to sell the property and that sale of the property is eminint. The Petition for Order to Confirm Trust Asset was continued to October 29, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Bresler to file a declaration regarding the above.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order To Confirm Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Continued To Oct-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
